film.title: Budhia Singh: Born to Run
film.overview: Budhia Singh – Born To Run is an Indian biographical sports film directed by Soumendra Padhi. It is based on Budhia Singh, who ran 48 marathons — one of which was from Bhubaneshwar to Puri, when he was a five-year-old.

dialogues.dialogue: It just can't be done This is an official function There are so many people here! A proud day for all Jawans here Please be silent for a while We have a 5 year old child with us

It's not about the run...it never was. If a man lives. he should live with self-respect Pride..Dignity..Even Kenyan athletes don't run such distances  at such temperatures Budhia becomes the youngest Marathon runner in the world
dialogues.cause_raw: becoming the youngest Marathon runner in the world

dialogues.dialogue: Though everybody was lost Few known faces Few unknown But prides reflects on everybody's eyes Seemingly old paths Which were now forgotten Have now come to forefront
I'll run more Say, I'll run another 100 kms I'll run 100 kms Budhia is the Pride of Orissa! Pride of India! Every sports person's inspiration our Budhia!
